features: Naturally white smile and fresh breath confidence
Helps freshen breath and strengthen enamel
description: Product Description Wisdom fresh effect whitening toothpaste has been formulated to help give protection from cavities while helping you achieve a naturally white smile and fresh breath confidence. Use with the fresh effect whitening brush and mouthwash for the ultimate fresh and white effect. Directions Apply a pea-sized amount of toothpaste to a toothbrush, wet the toothbrush, brush teeth for two minutes, and rinse mouth thoroughly. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use and consult a dentist if irritation occurs. See more
